creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Due stability problems or just for testing user may want to install specific version of drm-*-kmod package. drm-kmod is not always desired. This should also pull gpu-firmware-kmod because in fact this is a dependency for drm-*-kmod. There is only one firmware pakckage and various drm-*-kmod packages, so why not install firmwares too along with the drm driver of a specific version?

I can see this lack of dependency is by design, fine for me, thanks for your time :-)
